elements.text: You have a crush on someone in your class and you have really been enjoying getting to know them. Now that masks are no longer required, you are feeling self-conscious and wondering if they are judging what you look like without a mask. You remind yourself that a mask does not change how much you enjoy each other's...

elements.name: mask_insecurities--mental_health--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
